title: poa nepalensis var. nipponica
intro: Poa nepalensis var. nipponica, also known as Japanese meadow-grass, is a type of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in China and Japan, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa nepalensis var. nipponica include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and promoting digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and teas, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
